title: Human Feedback Record
description: Governed artifact capturing structured expert review of AI-generated outputs at the claim, section, or artifact level. Feeds AU (error taxonomy), AV (clustering), AW (prompt improvement), and AZ (data flywheel).

feedback_id.description: Unique identifier for this feedback record.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact this feedback targets (e.g., meeting_minutes_record ID, working_paper_section ID).

target_level.description: Granularity at which feedback is applied.

target_id.description: Identifier of the specific section or claim being reviewed. For artifact-level feedback, use the artifact_id.

action.description: Reviewer disposition on the reviewed unit.

original_text.description: The original AI-generated text being reviewed. Always preserved.

edited_text.description: Reviewer-provided corrected text. Required when action is minor_edit, major_edit, or rewrite. Null for accept, reject, or needs_support.

rationale.description: Reviewer's explanation for their action decision.

source_of_truth.description: Primary authoritative source the reviewer relied on.

failure_type.description: Classification of the detected failure, aligned with the AU error taxonomy.

severity.description: Impact severity of the identified issue.

golden_dataset.description: Whether this feedback should trigger a golden dataset update.

prompts.description: Whether this feedback should trigger a prompt update.

retrieval_memory.description: Whether this feedback should trigger a retrieval memory update.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 datetime when this feedback record was created.
